About

Driven by quality,
defined by precision.

I'm a final-year Computer Science & Engineering student at Peri Institute of Technology, Chennai (CGPA: 8.0), with a strong focus on software quality assurance, API testing, and backend development.

Motivated by the belief that great software is built through rigorous testing, I combine programming fundamentals — Java, Python, C — with hands-on experience in REST API validation, SQL, and Git-based workflows.

I completed a Data Science internship at CodSoft, and actively participate in open-source and competitive programming communities, having solved 1300+ challenges on SkillRack and won multiple inter-college competitions.

Beyond code, I led my college volleyball team as captain to the Anna University Zonal Championship Runner-Up — proof that I bring the same discipline and team spirit to everything I do.

Projects

Things I've
built.

01
Java · Backend · Console App
IRCTC Train Ticket Booking System
A modular, console-based train booking system built with structured service and entity layers. Features secure BCrypt password hashing, session validation, train search and route filtering, a visual seat matrix, booking & cancellation workflows, and JSON-based persistent storage via Jackson for data consistency.
Java BCrypt Gradle Jackson JSON Storage

03
Python · Deep Learning · Cybersecurity
Hybrid Deep Learning-Based Network Intrusion Detection System
Designed and developed a hybrid deep learning-based Network Intrusion Detection System using VGG16 and ResNet50 architectures on the UNSW-NB15 dataset to detect modern cyberattacks with high accuracy and reduced false alarms.
